# mtncloud_monitoring_check (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud monitoring check: an individual monitor (HTTP, ping, SNMP, …). `check_type` selects the monitor implementation and is immutable. Per-type settings go in `config` as a JSON document (config-authoritative, not read back). Use the `mtncloud_monitoring_check` data source or the Morpheus check-types reference to find a `check_type` code.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# An HTTP monitoring check. check_type selects the monitor implementation and is
# immutable; per-type settings go in config as a JSON document.
resource "mtncloud_monitoring_check" "home" {
  name           = "home-page"
  check_type     = "webGetCheck"
  description     = "Front door health"
  severity       = "critical"
  check_interval = 120000 # milliseconds

  config = jsonencode({
    webUrl = "https://www.example.ng"
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `check_type` (String) Check-type code (e.g. `webGetCheck`, `pingCheck`). Changing it forces a new check.
- `name` (String) Name of the check.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the check is scheduled to execute.
- `check_interval` (Number) Milliseconds between check executions (minimum is one minute, subject to your plan).
- `config` (String) Per-type configuration as a JSON object, e.g. `jsonencode({ webUrl = "https://example.com" })`. Config-authoritative (not read back).
- `description` (String) Description of the check.
- `in_uptime` (Boolean) Whether this check affects account-wide availability calculations.
- `severity` (String) Severity threshold for notifications (e.g. `info`, `warning`, `critical`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the check.
